notes: defaultHttpInstance is exported from http/index.ts as axios.create() result with request/response interceptors.

Combines multiple IRequestOptions fragments.

Marks a request so Client.formatPayload injects a user access token.
Registers handlers keyed by event type.
Validates, parses, and routes callback payloads to registered handlers.

Builds a koa-router style middleware for event/card callbacks.
Detects url_verification challenge payloads and returns challenge response body.
Creates a minimal interactive card JSON payload from title/content variables.
Decrypts Feishu encrypted callback payloads using AES-256-CBC.

Stops ping/reconnect loops and closes the active WebSocket instance.
Returns in-memory reconnect timing state.
Creates a session if needed, sends a message, starts a run, polls run status, then returns the assistant reply.
